_comment_: Reference shape for Claude Code .mcp.json (project-local) or ~/.claude.json. Copy the entries you want under your existing 'mcpServers' key. nubos-pilot does NOT manage this file — wire up per host.

context7._comment_: Library docs lookup. np-researcher probes this at spawn. Disable by removing the entry — researcher falls back to local-only with a Research Coverage section.

firecrawl._comment_: Web scraping for research-phase. Optional — researcher works without it.

exa._comment_: Semantic web search. Optional — researcher works without it.
